song.name: Fade Away
song.info: first time with Liam on vocals since 2002

song.name: Whatever
song.info: first time w/ Liam on vocals since '96; crowd sings The Beatles' "Octopus's Garden" snippet as outro

song.name: Live Forever
song.info: dedicated to footballer Diogo Jota, who died the day before

song.name: Don't Look Back in Anger
song.info: first time played with a full band since 2007

setlist.info: First performance since August 22, 2009. Liam and Noel Gallagher with Gem Archer, Paul "Bonehead" Arthurs (first time since 1998), Andy Bell, Christian Madden (keys), Joey Waronker (drums), brass: Joe Auckland (trumpet),  Steve Hamilton (sax), Alastair White (trombone).

The band cancelled their next two shows (festival sets) in the following 5 days, and on the 6th day Noel Gallagher released a statement announcing he had quit Oasis. Last concert until their reunion tour in 2025.

song.name: Cigarettes & Alcohol
song.info: Liam Gallagher hit out at a fan after this song

setlist.info: Part of the iTunes Live Festival and later included on the box set version of 'Time Flies ... 1994-2009' collection.

song.name: Wonderwall
song.info: Technical fault so crowd sung the majority of the song

setlist.info: A woman stormed on stage during the show but was maintained by security

song.info: Acoustic with Noel Gallagher on vocals

song.name: Don't Look Back in Anger
song.info: Acoustic, full song sung by fans

song.name: Wonderwall
song.info: Technical fault so crowd sung the majority of the song

setlist.info: As Liam finished singing the last song, he went frontstage to watch his own band playing, shook hands with some fans at the front row, gave his microphone to one of them, asked for a cigarette and applauded firstly Noel and then rest of his band
